info.title: Agent Optimization Service
info.description: Runs an agent against a TerminalBench subset in sandboxes, mines failures, and iteratively improves agent/agent.py via an LLM optimization loop.

get.summary: List jobs visible to the current user
Get job status and latest results
List all iterations for a job

schema.title: Response List Iterations Jobs  Job Id  Iterations Get

get.summary: Get full detail for one iteration (traces, LLM artifacts)
List all agent versions for a job

schema.title: Response List Job Agent Versions Jobs  Job Id  Agent Versions Get

get.summary: Get one agent version (full agent.py + diff)

post.summary: Cancel a queued or running job
Create a user in an organization

created_by_iteration.title: Created By Iteration
created_by_iteration.description: Iteration whose optimizer produced this version (None for v0).

content.title: Content
content.description: Full agent/agent.py source for this version.

proposed_agent_version_no.title: Proposed Agent Version No
proposed_agent_version_no.description: Agent version created by this iteration's optimizer proposal.

optimizer_context.title: Optimizer Context
optimizer_context.description: Failing tasks/traces and source agent version fed to the optimizer.

task_results.title: Task Results
task_results.description: Per-task structured results for this iteration (M1 contract).

proposed_agent_version_no.title: Proposed Agent Version No
proposed_agent_version_no.description: Agent version created by this iteration's optimizer proposal.

task_ids.title: Task Ids
task_ids.description: Benchmark task IDs to run. Defaults to the built-in subset.

patience.title: Patience
patience.description: Stop after this many consecutive iterations without score improvement.

executor.title: Executor
executor.description: simulated = deterministic fake benchmark (M1/M2/M4 dev); harbor = real Terminal-Bench via Harbor+Daytona (M3).

agent_model.title: Agent Model
agent_model.description: Override model for the agent under test.

per_task_timeout.title: Per Task Timeout
per_task_timeout.description: Per-task agent timeout in seconds (Harbor executor).

JobExecutorConfig.title: JobExecutorConfig
JobExecutorConfig.description: Executor-specific overrides. Unknown keys are preserved.

latest_task_results.title: Latest Task Results
latest_task_results.description: Structured M1 result from the most recent completed iteration: per-task pass/fail status and failure summaries. Empty while the job is still queued/running with no finished iteration.

JobResponse.title: JobResponse
JobResponse.description:
Job status plus structured benchmark results when available.

When `status` is `completed`, `latest_task_results` is the M1 deliverable:
which tasks passed/failed and a summary of observed failures.

latest_task_results.failure_summary: Simulated failure on cobol-modernization: agent did not explore environment or verify solution.

revoked.title: Revoked
revoked.description: True if a matching active refresh token was revoked.

role.description: admin manages the org; member submits/views own jobs.

MeResponse.title: MeResponse
MeResponse.description: Current authenticated user plus organization name.

OptimizerContext.title: OptimizerContext
OptimizerContext.description: Snapshot of inputs the optimizer used for one proposal.

OptimizerTaskSnippet.title: OptimizerTaskSnippet
OptimizerTaskSnippet.description: Compact task context fed into the optimizer prompt.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Refresh token previously issued by login or refresh.

reward.title: Reward
reward.description: Task reward in [0, 1], or null if unavailable.

failure_summary.title: Failure Summary
failure_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of why the task failed (null when passed).

trace.title: Trace
trace.description: Agent conversation / tool-call trace for this task.

verifier_result.title: Verifier Result
verifier_result.description: Raw verifier payload from the sandbox runner.

TaskResultOut.title: TaskResultOut
TaskResultOut.description: Structured per-task benchmark result (M1 output contract).

examples.failure_summary: Simulated failure on cobol-modernization: agent did not explore environment or verify solution.

TasksSummary.title: TasksSummary
TasksSummary.description:
Per-iteration task membership by status (IDs, not counts).

During a live benchmark, ``completed`` is ``all_task_ids - pending - running``
(finished, not yet classified). After results land, ``passed`` / ``failed`` /
``infra_error`` are filled and ``completed`` is their union.

TraceEnvelope.title: TraceEnvelope
TraceEnvelope.description: Harbor-style wrapper when the trace is not a bare message list.

TraceMessage.title: TraceMessage
TraceMessage.description: One turn in an agent conversation trace.

role.description: admin manages the org; member submits/views own jobs.

VerifierResult.title: VerifierResult
VerifierResult.description: Sandbox verifier output for a single task.

HTTPBearer.description: JWT access token from POST /auth/login or /auth/refresh.
